title: Charmer
description: Adds a collection of charms to Minecraft's worlds
body:
![[Charmer Mod Title]](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a2c59839bc93aa34b6c57a0ccfb129bfbad5660d.png)

<center> A small mod that aims to expand Minecraft's worlds with unique charms.
 
  ---
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DHcmYzKQ970" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
  


 </center>
 
# Features
- 20 Unique charms that can be found spread across the world. Equip them by holding them in the offhand.
-  Some notable charms are:
    - **Flyover** - Allows the bearer to place blocks behind them in order to quickly bridge across gaps.
    - **Plentiful Mould** - Allows the bearer to recieve any flower by right-clicking it with bonemeal.
    - **Gilded Pulse** - Grants the bearer a regenerating protective layer of the Absorption effect.
    - **Fermented Wart** - Emits a poisonous aura around the bearer.
    - **Goldsoul** - Grants the bearer the abillity to use Totems of Undying without holding them in the offhand.


## Planned Features
- ~30 more charms!

- Charm Box - Allows players to use up to 6 charms at a time. Will have it's own balance system, locking certain charms out when using others.

- A dedicated slot in the inventory for charms - instead of the current system which requires the charms to stay in your offhand.

---

Feel free to use the mod in modpacks.

**Currently in beta** - If you have any suggestions, now's the time! You can submit ideas through the bug report link~.

Hope you enjoy your time with it!

---
